'''wachozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hicket|hicket]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hicket|hicket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wachozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchezheth|wæchezheth]] || [[word:wæchezhej|wæchezhej]] || [[word:wæchezhesh|wæchezhesh]] || [[word:wæchezhe|wæchezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachochozhoth|wachochozhoth]] || [[word:wachochozhoj|wachochozhoj]] || [[word:wachochozhosh|wachochozhosh]] || [[word:wachochozho|wachochozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachozhoth|wachozhoth]] || [[word:wachozhoj|wachozhoj]] || [[word:wachozhosh|wachozhosh]] || [[word:wachozho|wachozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachofzhoth|wachofzhoth]] || [[word:wachofzhoj|wachofzhoj]] || [[word:wachofzhosh|wachofzhosh]] || [[word:wachofzhof|wachofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachozhotho|wachozhotho]] || [[word:wachozhojo|wachozhojo]] || [[word:wachozhosho|wachozhosho]] || [[word:wachozhoko|wachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachozhoth|wachozhoth]] || [[word:wachozhoj|wachozhoj]] || [[word:wachozhosh|wachozhosh]] || [[word:wachozho|wachozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachozhothol|wachozhothol]] || [[word:wachozhojol|wachozhojol]] || [[word:wachozhoshol|wachozhoshol]] || [[word:wachozhokol|wachozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachozhothotho|wachozhothotho]] || [[word:wachozhojojo|wachozhojojo]] || [[word:wachozhoshosho|wachozhoshosho]] || [[word:wachozhoko|wachozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachozhothon|wachozhothon]] || [[word:wachozhojon|wachozhojon]] || [[word:wachozhoshon|wachozhoshon]] || [[word:wachozhokon|wachozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachozhothoro|wachozhothoro]] || [[word:wachozhojoro|wachozhojoro]] || [[word:wachozhoshoro|wachozhoshoro]] || [[word:wachozhokoro|wachozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
